prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约6833名，2023年大幅前移至3370名，2024年回落至4564名，2025年回升至3559名，近四年呈震荡波动格局；2025年基准位次约3559名；该校在宁夏物理类招生计划：2022年27人、2023年27人、2024年28人、2025年31人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划33人，较2025年再扩招2人，扩招幅度约6 .5%，对竞争略有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京中医药大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升，2026年位列第63名，属于全国百强中上游水平，对 考生有较强吸引力；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要因2025年录取季该校在河北、河南等多省位次下滑超500名，中医学专业在黑龙江、吉林等省份出 现断档，最低录取位次跌至二本线，可能对2026年报考心理产生一定降温效应；抖音热度排名第103位，评价为一般；中医学、中西医结合、中药学为该校核心 优势学科（第五轮学科评估数据未收录该校，但上述学科长期位居全国前列），与物理类招生专业高度匹配，对相关专业报考有稳定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口 腔医学等医学大类社会热度持续偏热/推荐，中医药相关专业受益于医学整体热度；宁夏2026年高考总考生约6.6万人，与2025年（物理类4.45万+历史类2.14万≈6.59万）基本持平 ，竞争格局总体稳定；该校位于北京，对宁夏考生具有较强地域吸引力；宁夏本地无同类高水平中医药院校，跨省报考需求稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3559名、2026年小幅扩招（31→33人）带来的竞争加剧、学校排名持续上升的正面效应、以及声誉偏负面可能带来的报考降温，预计2026 年最低录取位次较2025年略有后移；预测最低位次约3647名，区间3147–4147名。

- 中医学（卓越5+3一体化）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约3647名，区间3147–4147名。位次在区间中上段（约3300名以内）可重点冲刺一档中医学领军人才/卓越班及中西医临床医学专业；位次在区间中段（约3600名附近） 以二档中医学、针灸推拿学、中药学为主力填报；位次在区间下段（约3900名以外）建议三档中药制药、药事管理、康复治疗学保底，同时可考虑公共管理类（2024年曾出现9389 名低位）作为更稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2022 was approximately 6833, significantly advanced to 3370 in 2023, fell back to 4564 in 2024, and rebounded to 3559 in 2025, showing fluctuating trends over the past four years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3559; the university's enrollment plan in Ningxia for Physics Category: 27 in 2022, 27 in 2023, 28 in 2024, 31 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 33, an increase of 2 from 2025, an expansion rate of about 6.5%, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been rising in recent years, ranking 63rd in 2026, which is in the upper-middle level of the national top 100, strongly attracting candidates; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly due to the university's ranking decline of over 500 places in multiple provinces such as Hebei and Henan during the 2025 admission season, and the Chinese Medicine major experienced a cutoff in Heilongjiang and Jilin provinces, with the minimum admission ranking falling to the second-tier line, which may have a cooling effect on the 2026 application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd, rated as average; Chinese Medicine, Integrated Chinese and Western Medicine, and Chinese Materia Medica are the university's core advantageous disciplines (the fifth round of discipline evaluation data is not included for this university, but these disciplines have long been among the top in the country), highly matching the Physics Category enrollment majors, providing stable support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical categories such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to be hot/recommended in society, and Chinese medicine-related majors benefit from the overall medical heat; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Ningxia college entrance examination is about 66,000, roughly the same as 2025 (Physics Category 44,500 + History Category 21,400 ≈ 65,900), with a generally stable competitive landscape; the university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional attraction for Ningxia candidates; there is no similar high-level Chinese medicine university locally in Ningxia, so cross-province application demand is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3559, the intensified competition from the small expansion in 2026 (31→33), the positive effect of the university's rising ranking, and the possible cooling of applications due to the slightly negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be slightly lower than in 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3647, with a range of 3147–4147.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Chinese Medicine (Leading Talent Training Program)/Chinese Medicine (Qihuang Class)/Chinese Medicine (Wang Qi Class)
- Integrated Chinese and Western Clinical Medicine (Hua Tuo Class)
- Chinese Medicine (Excellent 5+3 Integrated Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Chinese Medicine (Experimental Class)/Chinese Medicine
- Chinese Medicine (Excellent Chinese Medicine Pediatrics 5+3 Integrated Program)
- Acupuncture and Tuina
- Chinese Materia Medica.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chinese Medicine Pharmacy
- Pharmaceutical Administration
- Rehabilitation Therapy
- Bioengineering (Cross Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 3647, range 3147–4147. Candidates with rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (approximately within 3300) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Chinese Medicine Leading Talent/Excellent Class and Integrated Chinese and Western Clinical Medicine; candidates with rankings in the middle part of the range (approximately around 3600) should mainly fill in Tier 2 Chinese Medicine, Acupuncture and Tuina, and Chinese Materia Medica; candidates with rankings in the lower part of the range (approximately beyond 3900) are advised to use Tier 3 Chinese Medicine Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Administration, and Rehabilitation Therapy as safety choices, and may also consider Public Management (which had a low ranking of 9389 in 2024) as a more stable option.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2022 was approximately 1185, moved forward to 662 in 2023, further forward to 504 in 2024, and significantly moved back to 1039 in 2025, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising then falling over the past four years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1039; the university has a very small enrollment plan for History Category in Ningxia: 3 students each year from 2022 to 2025; the plan increases to 4 students in 2026, an expansion of about 33%, which has a significant impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked 63rd in the Soft Science Ranking, with a continuous upward trend in recent years, which also has a strong appeal to liberal arts candidates; the reputation in 2026 is negative (same as the Science Category), which may cool down the application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity is average. Traditional Chinese Medicine is A+, and Acupuncture and Tuina are traditional advantageous directions, partially related to the majors enrolled in History Category: Acupuncture and Tuina, Law (Medicine and Health), and Public Service Management (Health Management).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law (Medicine and Health) belongs to the Law category, with social popularity recommended/differentiated wait-and-see; Public Service Management belongs to the Management category, with average popularity; the total number of candidates in Ningxia in 2026 is roughly the same as in 2025, with a stable competitive landscape; universities in Beijing have a strong attraction for Ningxia candidates, but History Category only enrolls 3–4 students, with a very small enrollment scale, making ranking fluctuations easily affected by individual high-scoring candidates' application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 1039 in 2025, the easing of competition due to the expansion of 1 student in 2026 (3→4), the positive effect of the university's rising ranking, and the possible cooling effect from the negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move back compared to 2025 but with limited magnitude; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1217, with a range of 917–1517.

Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 1217, range 917–1517. History Category only enrolls 3 majors, with a very small number of students (4 in total), leading to high ranking fluctuation risk. Candidates with rankings in the upper segment of the range (approximately within 1000) can aim for Acupuncture and Tuina; those in the middle segment (around 1200) should focus on Law (Medicine and Health); those in the lower segment (beyond about 1400) can use Public Service Management as a safety option. It is recommended that candidates position themselves reasonably based on their interests and rankings.
